name: Beta-glucans
summary: Decision-ready summary: Beta-glucans is best framed for LDL cholesterol reduction; immune support; glycemic response; safety screen: immunosuppressants caution; GI bloating.
description: Beta-glucans supports cholesterol; immune; fiber with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: May cause GI symptoms; immune-modulation claims need cautious framing with immunosuppressant use.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Yeast beta-glucan has randomized evidence in URTI severity/incidence contexts, but product source matters.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Yeast beta-glucan has randomized evidence in URTI severity/incidence contexts, but product source matters.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: yeast beta-glucan 900 mg/day studied for URTI severity; oat beta-glucan dosing differs for cholesterol
